title: Composition of Expenditures on Food and Non-Food Items Consumed by Urban and Rural Households in a Month, by Main Items, for Selected Years, Iran 1965-1971 (percent)
source_org: International Bank for Reconstruction and Development (World Bank); underlying data from Statistical Center of Iran (SCI)
source_url: https://openknowledge.worldbank.org (World Bank Archives, Iran country documents)
extraction_method: MANUAL TRANSCRIPTION. Source document: data/raw/world-bank-archives-iran/historical-documents/1974_economic_development_vol4_statistical_appendix.pdf, Table 9.2, page 72 (PDF page 80). Rendered to PNG via pdftoppm -r 200 and visually read. No value interpolated, estimated, or fabricated.
notes: Companion table to wb1974-household-expenditure-food-nonfood-1965-1971 (Table 9.1), same survey series expressed as expenditure shares rather than absolute rial amounts. See that manifest for the known households-surveyed inconsistency between the two tables (both retained as printed in the source, not reconciled).
retrieved_by: claude (manual transcription with visual verification, pdftoppm -r 200 render + Read tool)
